title: SAFE-LD: Formal Verification of IEC 61131-3 Ladder Diagram Programs
description: SAFE-LD is a formal verifier for IEC 61131-3 Ladder Diagram programs integrated into ESBMC. This repository includes the tool, 13 industrial benchmarks across 6 domains, 2 real-world CONTROLLINO vendor programs, and the P4a conformance testing package (2000 concrete scan executions, 0 divergences).
references: Lopez-Miguel et al. (2022). PLCverif: Status of a Formal Verification Tool for PLC. arXiv:2203.17253
notes: Artefact for TACAS 2027 submission. Includes 13 benchmarks, P4a conformance testing (2000 scans, 0 divergences), and comparison with PLCverif.
